strands.strand: The Accounting Cycle and Source Documents

outcomes: Process business transactions through books of original entry and execute double-entry ledger postings cleanly
Extract a balanced Trial Balance and design corrective journal adjustments for errors that do or do not affect ledger balancing
Construct structured Statements of Profit or Loss (Trading and Profit & Loss Accounts) and Statements of Financial Position (Balance Sheets) for sole proprietorships

sub_strands.sub_strand: Demand, Supply, and Market Equilibrium Elasticities
outcomes: Formulate and graph mathematical functions matching individual and market demand and supply metrics
Calculate and interpret Price Elasticity of Demand (PED) and Price Elasticity of Supply (PES) values alongside geometric market equilibrium shifts

sub_strands.sub_strand: Factors of Production and Monetary/Fiscal Policy Inflation Systems
outcomes: Evaluate the productivity rewards of land, labor, capital, and entrepreneurship within a developing market framework
Analyze the structural causes (demand-pull vs. cost-push) of inflation and critique Central Bank regulatory interventions

sub_strands.sub_strand: Corporate Structures, Legal Frameworks, and Strategic Business Plans
outcomes: Differentiate the operational, liability, and capital extraction privileges of sole traders, partnerships, and limited liability corporations
Draft a comprehensive, bankable strategic business plan evaluating market research metrics, operational budgets, and SWOT components
